summary: TTS | Broadcast Options Tab from Details
description:
GIVEN a user is logged in
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user has selected a game feed for playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user has displayed the scrubber
AND navigates from Details to Broadcast Options
steps.result: THEN the user should hear "Broadcast Options x of x options, press up for player controls, press down to navigate broadcast options, press left for more options, press back to dismiss controls"
